name: Resilient
summary: Choose one ability score. You gain the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: Choose one ability score. You gain the following benefits:

items: Increase the chosen ability score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You gain proficiency in saving throws using the chosen ability.
